store.label: Plakar Store
store.help: Plakar store path or URL (e.g. /plakar-store or s3://bucket/prefix)

paths.label: Snapshot Paths
paths.help: Paths to snapshot. Defaults to the agent workspace directory.

timeout.label: Snapshot Timeout (ms)
timeout.help: Maximum time to wait for a snapshot operation. Default: 15000.
